title: Assumes Command of Corozal
situation: Roz is formally recognized as Cacique and takes responsibility for Corozal's security, law, and political posture.
knows: She has legitimate authority as Cacique of Corozal.
Public discipline and measured command are essential to maintaining unity.
does_not_know: The full scale of the coming external threat to Pisces.
Who will become reliable allies beyond Corozal.
How central Cuatroblade will become to future conflicts.
